scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w @mercenary/server" "npm run dev -w @mercenary/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mercenary/shared && npm run build -w @mercenary/server && npm run build -w @mercenary/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mercenary/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mercenary/server && npm run typecheck -w @mercenary/client
